A.missing: no clear 'did not exist before, exists after because of them'; mostly THINK/WANT vague activity
A.reason: Weak skeleton: agent wants something to exist and does much with many people, but the creation-from-nothing structure is muddled.

B.missing: no BEFORE not-exist; only 'does big thing a long time, it exists' — no bringing-into-being
B.reason: Generic: someone does a big thing over long time and it exists; lacks the before/after creation contrast.

C.reason: Renders the core: before there was none, agent does something, after it exists and becomes bigger — the empire/business creation shape.

D.reason: Before it did not exist, exists now because agent worked long with many people, many people inside it, it grows bigger — fits empire/business builder well.

E.reason: Creates something that did not exist, works with many people, it grows bigger and better because of them — captures the organizing/developing sense.

F.reason: Did not exist before now, exists because agent worked long, becomes a bigger kind — solid creation-and-growth rendering.

G.reason: Agent does much over long time, very big thing exists that did not before, many people inside it — matches empire builder.
